case_title: ROBBIE LOIS HART VS. JOYCE WICKETT

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY HART, ROBBIE LOIS AS TO DEFENDANT WICKETT, JOYCE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-02-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HART, ROBBIE LOIS ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOTHING IS REPORTED.
